overview: Recover end-to-end STAMPS parity by resolving remaining numeric drift in scoped stages, with the current focus on unresolved Stage-7 `scla2.mat` and `mean_v.mat` parity failures after partial correction of reviewed regressions.
goals: Align Python stage-3/4 patch re-estimation filter math with MATLAB behavior without changing unrelated logic.
Remove residual `C_ps2` and `ps_max` mismatches in stage-3/4 outputs.
Resolve remaining downstream parity mismatches in unwrapping and post-processing artifacts using scoped follow-up work.
Restore full Stage-7 parity for `scla2.mat.C_ps_uw` and `mean_v.mat.m` without reintroducing the reviewed master-sequencing or reference-radius regressions.
nonGoals: Redesigning CLI, packaging, or workflow orchestration.
Changing default tolerances as a substitute for fixing numeric behavior.
Any unrelated UI or external API changes.
successMetrics: Narrow compare for `PATCH_*/select1.mat` and `PATCH_*/weed1.mat` passes with zero mismatches.
Full `pystamps verify` for the same run/golden pair has no failures, or produces only explicitly accepted follow-up deviations.
openQuestions: Should output phase normalization in stage-3 filtering be kept strictly implicit as current logic, or enforced explicitly before top-of-fit?
Should unresolved stage-6/7/8 mismatches be fixed in this same PRD cycle or split into separate execution cycles if risk requires it?
Which remaining Stage-7 math differences versus StaMPS still explain the large `C_ps_uw` and `mean_v` verify deltas after the reviewed fixes?

importFormat.description: Existing dataset fixtures are used; no schema change for inputs/outputs.

rules: Keep stage-3/4 control flow and masks unchanged; only adjust filter-core parity in the identified path.
Any downstream fix must be scoped to the failing artifact group it addresses.
Each change must be backed by one or more deterministic verify commands and saved results.
Stage-7 fixes must preserve master-inclusive sequential differencing until the later non-master solve path and must compare `ref_radius` in local-coordinate units.
A story touching Stage 7 is not complete until focused regression tests pass and `scla2.mat` plus `mean_v.mat` no longer fail verify for the tracked run/golden pair.
qualityGates:
PYTHONPATH=. uv run python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
from pystamps.pipeline.ported import stage7_calc_scla
print(stage7_calc_scla(Path('./tmp/pystamps_iter14_stage3plus')))
PY

OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS=1 OMP_NUM_THREADS=1 MKL_NUM_THREADS=1 PYTHONPATH=. uv run scripts/narrow_compare.py --run ./tmp/pystamps_iter14_stage3plus --golden ./inputs_and_outputs/InSAR_dataset_test --patterns PATCH_*/select1.mat PATCH_*/weed1.mat --atol 1e-10 --rtol 1e-10
OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS=1 OMP_NUM_THREADS=1 MKL_NUM_THREADS=1 PYTHONPATH=. uv run pystamps verify --run ./tmp/pystamps_iter14_stage3plus --golden ./inputs_and_outputs/InSAR_dataset_test

stories.title: Align stage-3 stack filter core with MATLAB filter2 behavior
stories.description: As a maintainer, I want `_clap_filt_patch_stack` to match MATLAB behavior so stage-3 re-estimation outputs align with the reference.
acceptanceCriteria: Update `pystamps/pipeline/ported.py` in `_clap_filt_patch_stack` to use per-interferogram 2-D convolution equivalent to MATLAB `filter2`/`conv2` behavior.
Re-run narrow compare for stage-3/4 and report `C_ps2` and `ps_max` no longer failing in `select1.mat`/`weed1.mat`.
Negative case: do not alter stage-1, stage-2, and stage-5 logic or selection/neighbor masks.
Validation gate: rerun narrow compare and full verify commands; mark completed only if outcomes match acceptance criteria in this PRD.

stories.title: Classify and isolate downstream residual parity failures
stories.description: As a maintainer, I want remaining parity failures broken down by stage so each can be fixed with minimal risk and clear ownership.
acceptanceCriteria: Run full verify and produce a fresh list of failures from the same run/golden pair.
Capture grouping at least into unwrap/smoothing and unwrapped-noise/statistics classes.
Do not modify stage-3/4 code in downstream stories unless trace evidence shows coupling.

stories.title: Close unwrap-stage parity differences (`pm2`, `ifgstd2`, unwrap noise, and grids)
stories.description: As a maintainer, I want unwrap-related outputs to match reference so unwrapped fields and error statistics align.
acceptanceCriteria: Run full verify and confirm these keys are no longer failing before moving to stage-6/8 only artifacts.
Negative case: reject any change that increases stage-4/weed failures.

stories.title: Close atmosphere/statistics parity differences (`scla2`, `mean_v`)
stories.description: As a maintainer, I want post-unwrap atmospheric outputs to match the reference after successful unwrap/statistics alignment.
acceptanceCriteria: Resolve mismatches in `scla2.mat.C_ps_uw` and `mean_v.mat.m` with deterministic fixes.

Preserve the reviewed invariants: keep the master interferogram in the Stage-7 sequential `diff(...)` series until the later solve path, and compare finite `ref_radius` directly in local-coordinate units.
Re-run focused Stage-7 regression tests plus full verify and confirm `scla2.mat` and `mean_v.mat` no longer fail.
Negative case: do not claim completion while `scla2.mat` or `mean_v.mat` still fail verify, and do not change earlier-stage math unrelated to these artifacts.

stories.title: Audit remaining Stage-7 parity drift after reviewed regression fixes
stories.description: As a maintainer, I want the remaining Stage-7 parity gap isolated against StaMPS so the next fix targets the actual `C_ps_uw` and `mean_v` math still diverging after the reviewed corrections.
acceptanceCriteria: Capture the current evidence set: local Stage-7 tests pass, direct `stage7_calc_scla()` reruns succeed, but full verify still reports `scla2.mat.C_ps_uw` and `mean_v.mat.m` mismatches.
Identify at least one concrete remaining mismatch candidate in the Stage-7 parity path, such as solve design, covariance use, deramp/reference handling, or index selection, with code-level evidence.
Produce a scoped follow-up fix plan that names the files, invariants, and exact validation commands to rerun.
Negative case: do not broaden scope into unrelated Stage-6/8 cleanup unless the audit shows a direct dependency on the Stage-7 mismatch.
